case_title: LEWIS, STEVEN D. VS AVOCA TRUCKING & EXCAVATING, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEWIS, STEVEN D. AS TO DEFENDANT AVOCA TRUCKING & EXCAVATING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, STEVEN D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVOCA TRUCKING & EXCAVATING, INC. $2,359.48 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,434.48, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $11,797.42, AND ATTRIBUTES 20% FAULT TO DEFENDANT AVOCA TRUCKING & EXCAVATING, INC. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT SENT TO DEFT AVOCA TRUCKING & EXCAVATING INC. RETURNED. UNABLE TO FORWARD.
